creator: iwtcex@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Alexey Dokuchaev from comment #67)

Likely because libnvidia-glvkspirv.so is not mentioned at http://us.download.nvidia.com/XFree86/Linux-x86_64/396.18/README/installedcomponents.html vs http://us.download.nvidia.com/XFree86/Linux-x86_64/396.24/README/installedcomponents.html. Which indeed looks like an oversight.
